Who I Am

Most people choose between technology and communication. I chose both.

Resume LinkedIn GitHub Certifications

I'm a Computer Science & Engineering student at Manav Rachna University (Batch of 2024–2028), driven by a strong passion for bridging the gap between technical innovation and strategic communication.

I enjoy building innovative solutions and exploring emerging technologies. As a trainer and communicator, I am equally passionate about helping people learn, grow, and express themselves with confidence. I have conducted language and presentation skills sessions, created content for social impact initiatives, anchored events, participated in national-level hackathons, and represented causes I deeply believe in.

These experiences have reinforced my belief that the ability to connect with people is just as important as the ability to build technology. Whether developing AI-driven solutions, facilitating discussions, mentoring students, or speaking before an audience, I strive to create meaningful impact through a blend of technical expertise, leadership, and effective communication.

My goal is simple: to leverage technology, communication, and continuous learning to build solutions that empower people, solve real-world challenges, and create lasting value.

Academic Contribution

Published Research Paper

While we spend years mastering programming, algorithms, and systems, industry expectations clearly show that how we communicate, collaborate, and think critically is just as important as what we code.

Curated with a thorough student-led survey, my research paper titled "Integrating Soft Skills with Technology Education for Computer Science Engineers: A Study on Employability and Industry Readiness" was officially published in the International Journal for Multidisciplinary Research (IJFMR) — Volume 8, Issue 1, January–February 2026. E-ISSN: 2582-2160, Impact Factor: 9.24.

This research bridges the gap between classroom learning and real-world industry demands.

Read Paper →

Innovation & Entrepreneurship

Project — FireGuard

Fire Guard is a real-time AI-based fire detection system that identifies fire, smoke, and sparks in under one second using computer vision and edge-cloud architecture. Designed for complex industrial environments, it significantly reduces false alarms while enabling instant alerts and automated response mechanisms. The system integrates CCTV surveillance, Raspberry Pi-based edge processing, and cloud analytics within a scalable SaaS model, making advanced fire safety efficient, reliable, and accessible across industries like manufacturing, warehouses, and data centers.

Representing FireGuard at national-level competitions, Shambhavi led the marketing and pitching strategy that earned Silver at EDII Ahmedabad and 2nd place at the National Startup Day Competition — bringing AI-powered fire safety innovation to the forefront of India's startup ecosystem.

My Role as Marketing Head

Market StrategyLed end-to-end marketing strategy and go-to-market execution addressing a ₹2,300 Cr+ market with 7% CAGR, positioning across high-risk sectors including textile, chemical, and warehouse industries.
Early TractionDrove early-stage traction and validation, securing 2 industrial site deals for beta deployment.
National PitchingAchieved Silver at EDII Ahmedabad (Top National Innovation Platform) and 2nd place at National Startup Day Competition, outperforming competing startups.
GTM RoadmapDesigned and executed a 24-month GTM roadmap: pilot acquisition (3–6 sites), early customer funnel development, and strategic pathways toward 50+ installations and enterprise partnerships.
Cross-functional CollaborationAligned SaaS-based revenue model (recurring subscriptions + hardware sales) with customer needs, contributing to scalable monetization strategy.
IP StrategySupported patent drafting to strengthen IP positioning and long-term competitive advantage.
